lines.gurmukhi: ਵਰਨੁ ਭੇਖੁ ਅਸਰੂਪੁ ਸੁ ਏਕੋ ਏਕੋ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਿਡਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: varan bhekh asaroop su eko eko sabad viddaanee |
lines.english: Color, dress and form were contained in the One Lord; the Shabad was contained in the One, Wondrous Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚ ਬਿਨਾ ਸੂਚਾ ਕੋ ਨਾਹੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਅਕਥ ਕਹਾਣੀ ॥੬੭॥
lines.translit: saach binaa soochaa ko naahee naanak akath kahaanee |67|
lines.english: Without the True Name, no one can become pure; O Nanak, this is the Unspoken Speech. ||67||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਤੁ ਕਿਤੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਜਗੁ ਉਪਜੈ ਪੁਰਖਾ ਕਿਤੁ ਕਿਤੁ ਦੁਖਿ ਬਿਨਸਿ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kit kit bidh jag upajai purakhaa kit kit dukh binas jaaee |
lines.english: "How, in what way, was the world formed, O man? And what disaster will end it?"

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਜਗੁ ਉਪਜੈ ਪੁਰਖਾ ਨਾਮਿ ਵਿਸਰਿਐ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: haumai vich jag upajai purakhaa naam visariai dukh paaee |
lines.english: In egotism, the world was formed, O man; forgetting the Naam, it suffers and dies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਤਤੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਜਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai su giaan tat beechaarai haumai sabad jalaae |
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh contemplates the essence of spiritual wisdom; through the Shabad, he burns away his egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਾਚੈ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: tan man niramal niramal baanee saachai rahai samaae |
lines.english: His body and mind become immaculate, through the Immaculate Bani of the Word. He remains absorbed in Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੇ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਹੈ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਸਾਚੁ ਰਖਿਆ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: naame naam rahai bairaagee saach rakhiaa ur dhaare |
lines.english: Through the Naam, the Name of the Lord, he remains detached; he enshrines the True Name in his heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਜੋਗੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਹੋਵੈ ਦੇਖਹੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਬੀਚਾਰੇ ॥੬੮॥
lines.translit: naanak bin naavai jog kade na hovai dekhahu ridai beechaare |68|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the Name, Yoga is never attained; reflect upon this in your heart, and see. ||68||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਾਚੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh saach sabad beechaarai koe |
lines.english: The Gurmukh is one who reflects upon the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚੁ ਬਾਣੀ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sach baanee paragatt hoe |
lines.english: The True Bani is revealed to the Gurmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਨੁ ਭੀਜੈ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਬੂਝੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh man bheejai viralaa boojhai koe |
lines.english: The mind of the Gurmukh is drenched with the Lord's Love, but how rare are those who understand this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh nij ghar vaasaa hoe |
lines.english: The Gurmukh dwells in the home of the self, deep within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਣੈ ॥੬੯॥
lines.translit: guramukh naanak eko jaanai |69|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh knows the One Lord alone. ||69||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜੋਗੀ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਪਛਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh jogee jugat pachhaanai |
lines.english: The Gurmukh realizes the Way of Yoga.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਜੋਗੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur seve jog na hoee |
lines.english: Without serving the True Guru, Yoga is not attained;

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭੇਟੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur bhette naam paaeaa na jaae |
lines.english: Without meeting the True Guru, the Naam cannot be found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭੇਟੇ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur bhette mukat na koee |
lines.english: without meeting the True Guru, no one is liberated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭੇਟੇ ਮਹਾ ਗਰਬਿ ਗੁਬਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur bhette mahaa garab gubaar |
lines.english: Without meeting the True Guru, there is only the deep darkness of egotistical pride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭੇਟੇ ਮਹਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur bhette mahaa dukh paae |
lines.english: Without meeting the True Guru, one suffers in terrible pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਾਚੁ ਰਖਿਆ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh saach rakhiaa ur dhaar |
lines.english: The Gurmukh enshrines Truth in his heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਨੁ ਜੀਤਾ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh man jeetaa haumai maar |
lines.english: The Gurmukh conquers his mind by subduing his ego.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਮੁਆ ਜਨਮੁ ਹਾਰਿ ॥੭੦॥
lines.translit: naanak bin gur muaa janam haar |70|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the True Guru, one dies, having lost the opportunity of this life. ||70||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਹਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh daragah na aavai haar |
lines.english: The Gurmukh does not lose in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਗੁ ਜੀਤਾ ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ਮਾਰਿ ਬਿਦਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh jag jeetaa jamakaal maar bidaar |
lines.english: The Gurmukh conquers the world; he knocks down the Messenger of Death, and kills it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਸੋੁ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh mel milaae so jaanai |
lines.english: The Gurmukh is united in God's Union; he alone knows.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੈ ਕਾ ਨਿਬੇੜਾ ਸੁਣਿ ਤੂ ਅਉਧੂ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਜੋਗੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: sabadai kaa niberraa sun too aaudhoo bin naavai jog na hoee |
lines.english: This is the essence of the Shabad - listen, you hermits and Yogis. Without the Name, there is no Yoga.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਣੈ ॥੭੧॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh sabad pachhaanai |71|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh realizes the Word of the Shabad. ||71||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੈ ਹੀ ਤੇ ਸਭੁ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਨਾਮੇ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: naamai hee te sabh paragatt hovai naame sojhee paaee |
lines.english: Through the Name, everything is revealed; through the Name, understanding is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੇ ਰਾਤੇ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਮਾਤੇ ਨਾਮੈ ਤੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: naame raate anadin maate naamai te sukh hoee |
lines.english: Those who are attuned to the Name, remain intoxicated night and day; through the Name, they find peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਅਉਧੂ ਜੋਗ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਤਾ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur te naam paaeeai aaudhoo jog jugat taa hoee |
lines.english: The Name is obtained only from the True Guru, O hermit, and then, the Way of Yoga is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਭੇਖ ਕਰਹਿ ਬਹੁਤੇਰੇ ਸਚੈ ਆਪਿ ਖੁਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: bin naavai bhekh kareh bahutere sachai aap khuaaee |
lines.english: Without the Name, people wear all sorts of religious robes; the True Lord Himself has confused them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ਮਨਿ ਦੇਖਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥੭੨॥
lines.translit: kar beechaar man dekhahu naanak bin naavai mukat na hoee |72|
lines.english: Reflect upon this in your mind, and see; O Nanak, without the Name, there is no liberation. ||72||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਗੁਪਤਾ ਆਪੇ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਆਪੇ ਸਭਿ ਰੰਗ ਮਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: too aape gupataa aape paragatt aape sabh rang maanai |
lines.english: You Yourself are hidden, and You Yourself are revealed. You Yourself enjoy all pleasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੀ ਗਤਿ ਮਿਤਿ ਤੂਹੈ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਕਿਆ ਕੋ ਆਖਿ ਵਖਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: teree gat mit toohai jaaneh kiaa ko aakh vakhaanai |
lines.english: You alone know Your state and extent, Lord; What can anyone say about it?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਗਹਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਾਇ ਇਹ ਭਿਖਿਆ ਤੇਰੇ ਦਰਸਨ ਕਉ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: maageh naam paae ih bhikhiaa tere darasan kau kurabaanai |
lines.english: They beg for Your Name, and You bless them with this charity. I am a sacrifice to the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਿਕ ਸਿਧ ਗੁਰੂ ਬਹੁ ਚੇਲੇ ਖੋਜਤ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਫੁਰਮਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: saadhik sidh guroo bahu chele khojat fireh furamaanai |
lines.english: The seekers, the Siddhas, the many gurus and disciples wander around searching for You, according to Your Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਖੇਲੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੋਝੀ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: abinaasee prabh khel rachaaeaa guramukh sojhee hoee |
lines.english: The eternal imperishable Lord God has staged this play; the Gurmukh understands it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਭਿ ਜੁਗ ਆਪੇ ਵਰਤੈ ਦੂਜਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥੭੩॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sabh jug aape varatai doojaa avar na koee |73|1|
lines.english: O Nanak, He extends Himself throughout the ages; there is no other than Him. ||73||1||
